name: @gravity-platform/elevenlabs
description: ElevenLabs audio AI for Gravity workflows — text-to-speech, multi-speaker dialogue, sound effects, and speech-to-text

nodes.name: ElevenLabs TTS
nodes.description: Convert text to lifelike speech with any ElevenLabs voice

nodes.name: ElevenLabs Dialogue
nodes.description: Render a multi-speaker script to a single audio track, each line in its own voice

nodes.name: ElevenLabs Sound Effects
nodes.description: Generate a sound effect clip from a text prompt

nodes.name: ElevenLabs Speech to Text
nodes.description: Transcribe an audio or video file to text with the Scribe model

nodes.name: ElevenLabs Music
nodes.description: Compose an original music track from a text prompt

credentials.name: ElevenLabs API Key
credentials.description: API key from the ElevenLabs dashboard (Profile → API Keys)
